prompt: hey i just set up my awp wallet, address is 0x742d35Cc6634C0532925a3b844Bc9e7595f2bD68. can you check how much AWP i have staked and show me all my positions? also want to know how much is unallocated so i know what i can work with

assertions.name: formats_amounts_human
assertions.description: Shows AWP amounts in human-readable format, not raw wei strings

assertions.name: shows_positions_table
assertions.description: Displays position details including lock end dates

assertions.name: no_hardcoded_addresses
assertions.description: Does not hardcode contract addresses — uses /registry
